text:
Megapost on the Iran War situation coming this week. It will be available for free to all. Sign up now (leave your email) not to miss it.
From richardhanania.com
Conservatives wanted a freer internet. Smarter ones are coming to realize you need quality control. It's supposed to be the libs who believe in radical egalitarianism!

The funny thing about "Buy American" is that you're allowed to do that now. But people shop according to price and quality. If they truly cared about nationalist goals, you wouldn't need to force them. https://richardhanania.com/p/two-ways-to-think-about-the-collective

While we're talking about the Twitter algorithm, I just noticed this got 1.6 million views. My links to reviews of Dostoevsky and deep dives into state housing policy, subjects of recent articles, will never get a fraction of that.
Fine, I'll post some slop. This kind isn't

This kind of brain rot is about as depressing as Catturd's popularity.
Seeing the degree to which right wingers refuse to deal with reality has radicalized me in favor of the MSM. https://richardhanania.com/p/why-the-media-is-honest-and-good
These people are actually happy to be part of a movement where Catturd is their intellectual leader. Why doesn't the New York Times become more like him! Huh, libs? Afraid of open debate?

The problem with Twitter isn't a lack of "viewpoint diversity."
We have plenty! Nazis and Jackson Hinkle and Tucker have differences between them. The problem is that the new X is dominated by trash.
What a bizarre blind spot to not see lack of quality as the problem.

Elon Musk: The best evidence that the X algorithm pushes low quality info is that it gives us Nate Silver tweets. Not that Gunther and Jackson Hinkle dominate the algorithm.
How can someone so smart in some areas be this stupid? https://richardhanania.com/p/liberals-only-censor-musk-seeks-to
You might like
Wesley Yang

Jesus Christ. This is discourse hell.
If this doesn't make you say bring back the gatekeepers, I don't know what will. https://richardhanania.com/p/bring-back-the-internet-gatekeepers

"A report by Russian foreign intelligence showed that Moscow was so worried about Orban's standing that it considered staging an assassination attempt on Orban to try to boost his sagging popularity."
Now that's thinking outside the box.
From washingtonpost.com
Countries with the most champagne must have the least water.

Before you get mad at this, realize you're probably getting mad at a foreign backed AI account.
Nobody with the least familiarity with Americans would think a person who looks like this with these views is possible.
The community notes shows why you need to get your worldview from reading instead of pictures and videos. They develop their worldview in the same way as toddlers who haven't yet learned how to read.

God this article made me support European governments locking up every last rightoid.
They don't eat at specific times according to the rules! They have bus boys!
